title: Hearthian Deco
description: A decoration mod based off of the game Outer Wilds by Mobius Digital and Annapurna Interactive.
body:
# Hearthian Deco!

## Summary

A decoration mod based off of the game Outer Wilds by Mobius Digital and Annapurna Interactive. It adds several decorative blocks (Stardust Slate, Corrugated Copper to name a few) as well as Ghost Matter, a substance that can cause many deaths.

Please go and play Outer Wilds!! Whilst you will see things in this mod, you will not understand them!! (P.S. outer wilds is a very spoiler heavy game, so we limited ourselves to things in the trailer and the starting town museum!!)

Designed for use with [Amethyst Gravity Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-gravity-reattracted)
## Addition List
### Hearthian Grass and its types
A Directional grass for use in builds both with and without a planet creation mod. Made by stone cutting Grass for now
### Star Slate
An animated star block that allows for very nice room layouts ect. Made by smelting smooth stone for now.
### Interloping debris
Decor block that looks very nice and can be instamined, can be obtained through finding and foraging a ghost matter geode.
### Corrugated Copper
A decor block with a new sheet variant, that acts like a carpent but can be placed on the sides of blocks also! Made by stonecutting a copper block!
### Timber Pine Wood Set!
A neat new wood set that is a middle ground between oak and spruce! Obtained through stonecutting a spruce sapling for now.

THERE IS CURRENTLY A BUG THAT MAKES THE LEAVES ALWAYS DROP SAPLINGS!!!!!!!
### Interloping Ice
An Ice Block with the physics of real world Ice!! Obtained through ghost matter geodes!!!
### Dark Ice
An Ice block with double the friction of interloping ice, obtained through stonecutting blue ice!
### Ghost Matter
A block set that releases deadly ghost matter gas, this can kill those even in creative or spectator! Found in the aptly named ghost matter geodes!

## Special Thanks!
Extra Special thanks to TheMinecraftDino / BredDino for help in teaching me some coding concepts and helping with code

Thanks to Kaupenjoe for teaching me modding through his amazing course

And thanks to MaidCharluk, PantsTheGod, thejpg, WrittenCross6 and XMRkosa for being an inspiration to me!
